sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88646" key="prosantlhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσαντλ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n88646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must foment</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
